{{Infobox artifact
| name = Eye of the Deep
| introduced = Ghostwater
}}

''See also: [[Eye of the Deep Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Eye]] of the Deep is a specialized artifact that serves as a key to the [[Ghostwater facility]], granting access to its primary areas. Originally entrusted to the final [[Naru Huan|Blackflame Emperor]] by a [[Herald]] of the [[Monarch]], these objects function as tools for gathering and recording information. They are designed to collect knowledge through various constructs distributed across the world, eventually returning to a central location to contribute their findings to a collective whole. Beyond their role as keys, they are highly valued items; presenting one to the tree allows a person to ask a single question and receive a drop of ghostwater, an act that earns the favor of [[Northstrider]]. Physically, the [[Eye]] can appear as a jewel that may leak white-and-purple dream madra if damaged. In some instances, the artifact has been used in conjunction with a spirit named [[Dross]] to facilitate upgrades within the [[Ghostwater facility]].}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Eye]] of the Deep is a round, cut sapphire slightly larger than a fist that shimmers like sunlight filtered through water. Carried by [[Renfei]], the jewel possesses the ability to deactivate portals and serves as the key to [[Ghostwater]]. The gem contains a damaged internal [[construct]] and leaks white-and-purple dream madra [[essence]] from a crack, while also projecting a blue light over an indentation in a stone tower. Although [[Lindon]] eventually released the item, [[Dross]] is located within it, and the gem functions as a key to the facility. An [[Eye]] of the Deep is also known to be in the possession of [[Harmony]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">15</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Eye of the Deep]] is a sapphire that shimmers like sunlight filtered through water and casts blue illumination.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c2">''Ghostwater'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Eye of the Deep]] is an item carried by [[Renfei]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Renfei]] was gripping the [[Eye of the Deep]] in her left hand.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c3">''Ghostwater'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Eye of the Deep]] can deactivate a portal.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Eye of the Deep]] is a jewel with white-and-purple dream madra drifting out of a crack.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Eye of the Deep]] is a round, cut gem slightly larger than a fist.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c5">''Ghostwater'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Eye of the Deep]] contains a damaged internal [[construct]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Eye of the Deep]] shows a blue light hovering over an indentation in a stone tower.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Eye of the Deep]] is a gem that is leaking [[essence]] from a crack.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c6">''Ghostwater'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Eye of the Deep]] is the key to [[Ghostwater]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] released the [[Eye of the Deep]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c9">''Ghostwater'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Dross]] is in the [[Eye of the Deep]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15">''Ghostwater'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|An [[Eye of the Deep]] is a key to the facility.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|An [[Eye of the Deep]] is mentioned.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Harmony]] possesses an [[Eye of the Deep]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c16">''Ghostwater'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Underlord ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] combined [[Dross]] with the [[Eye of the Deep]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8">''Underlord'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|“This is the key to Ghostwater, but it’s losing cohesion.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c6" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
